examples: This tendency in his thought is deepened by his suspicion of all Utopian political programmes.
There have been a lot of utopian cities in history.
This Utopian dream is far beyond the range of possibility.
Continuing our utopian fantasy, imagine that the antitrust laws treated unions the way they treat corporations.
Digital Bridge, Open Range and Utopian Wireless have all won broadband infrastructure grants in recent years.
